data.title: Otello Expands Treasury Stock Through Ongoing Share Buyback Program
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Otello Corporation ASA ( (GB:0FI5) ) has issued an announcement.

Otello Corporation ASA continues to execute its ongoing share buyback program, with Pareto Securities purchasing 103,200 shares between 20 and 24 April 2026 at an average price of NOK 19.81. This latest tranche brings total repurchases under the current program to 1,077,616 shares at an average price of NOK 18.23, for an aggregate consideration of NOK 19.65 million.

The buyback program allows purchases at up to NOK 20 per share, with a maximum of 3,689,541 shares authorized, and Otello now holds 4,767,157 treasury shares including shares from a previous program. The repurchases, carried out under a mandate from an extraordinary general meeting in September 2025, underscore the company’s active capital management and may signal confidence in its valuation while gradually increasing the ownership stake of remaining shareholders.

More about Otello Corporation ASA

Otello Corporation ASA operates in the technology and software sector, historically focusing on internet and mobile platforms and related digital services. The company is listed in Norway and actively manages its capital structure, including the use of share buyback programs to optimize its equity base and return capital to shareholders.

Average Trading Volume: 86,464

Current Market Cap: NOK1.42B

Yaari Digital Integrated Services Limited ( (IN:IBULLSLTD) ) has shared an announcement.

Indiabulls Limited, formerly known as Yaari Digital Integrated Services Limited, is a publicly listed entity within the Indiabulls group, with a registered office in Gurgaon and a corporate office in Mumbai. The company operates under the Indian securities regulatory regime and maintains listings on both BSE and NSE, positioning it squarely within India’s formal financial and capital markets landscape.

The company has scheduled a board meeting on April 29, 2026, to consider and approve its audited financial results for the quarter and full financial year ended March 31, 2026, and will host a conference call the same day at 4:00 p.m. IST for analysts and investors to discuss the Q4 and FY26 performance. In line with SEBI’s insider trading rules, the trading window for Indiabulls securities will remain closed until May 1, 2026, signaling heightened governance controls around the results announcement and giving markets a clear timetable for key financial disclosures.

More about Yaari Digital Integrated Services Limited

Indiabulls Limited, formerly Yaari Digital Integrated Services Limited, operates as part of the broader Indiabulls group, with registered offices in Gurgaon and a corporate base in Mumbai. The company is listed on both BSE and NSE, indicating a focus on public capital markets and a regulated presence in India’s diversified financial and services sectors.

Its operations are governed by Indian securities regulations, including the SEBI Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements and insider trading norms. This regulatory framework underscores the company’s integration into mainstream financial markets and its obligation to maintain transparency with investors and other stakeholders.

An announcement from Vinyl Chemicals (India) Limited ( (IN:VINYLINDIA) ) is now available.

Vinyl Chemicals (India) Limited has approved the re-appointment of Shri Madhukar Parekh as Managing Director for a further five-year term starting April 1, 2027, subject to shareholder approval. Parekh, an eminent chemical engineer with more than 55 years’ experience and Executive Chairman of Pidilite Industries, is expected to provide continued strategic and operational leadership to the company.

The board has also cleared the re-appointment of solicitor Shri Prakash Shah as an Independent Director for a second consecutive five-year term from October 6, 2026 to October 5, 2031, pending shareholder consent. Shah’s extensive legal and tax litigation background, including appearances before key Indian High Courts, is set to strengthen the company’s corporate governance and regulatory oversight.

More about Vinyl Chemicals (India) Limited

Vinyl Chemicals (India) Limited operates in the chemicals sector, focusing on specialty and industrial chemical products for various end-use industries. The company is listed on both BSE and NSE, giving it access to India’s capital markets and a broad base of public shareholders.

data.title: Oculis Advances Targeted Dry Eye Drug Licaminlimab Into Late-Stage Testing
data.description:
Oculis Holding Ag (OCS) announced an update on their ongoing clinical study.

Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

The new Oculis study, titled “A Phase 2b/3, Double-masked, Randomized, Vehicle-controlled, Multicenter Study Evaluating Licaminlimab in Dry Eye Disease Patients With a Specific TNFR1 Genotype,” aims to test a late-stage eye drop in dry eye disease. It focuses on how well and how safely licaminlimab works in a genetic subgroup, which could support a targeted, higher-value niche in a crowded market.

The main treatment is licaminlimab eye drops, given three times a day for about one month to people with dry eye disease. A matching placebo eye drop, called the vehicle, and a short artificial tear run-in phase are used to cleanly compare outcomes and confirm the drug’s added benefit over common lubricating drops.

The study is interventional and randomized, meaning patients are assigned by chance to licaminlimab or placebo. It uses a parallel design and is double-masked, so neither patients nor doctors know which treatment is given, with the primary goal to treat signs and symptoms of dry eye disease.

The trial is currently recruiting, with initial submission on 2026-04-16 and the latest update filed on 2026-04-23, signaling an active setup phase. Primary and final completion dates are not yet posted, but investors should assume data will emerge several years after first patient dosing, which aligns with typical Phase 2b/3 ophthalmology timelines.

This update supports a long-term pipeline story for Oculis (OCS) rather than near-term revenue, but it may lift sentiment by showing progress in a genetically defined dry eye segment. Investors should watch how this program stacks against larger players in dry eye, such as AbbVie and Bausch + Lomb, because strong data could justify premium pricing and partnership interest. The study is ongoing and further details are available on the ClinicalTrials portal.

To learn more about OCS’s potential, visit the Oculis Holding Ag drug pipeline page.

data.title: Mangalam Worldwide Declares SEBI Large Corporate Rules Not Applicable for FY 2026-27
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

An announcement from Mangalam Worldwide Ltd. ( (IN:MWL) ) is now available.

Mangalam Worldwide Ltd. has notified the National Stock Exchange that it does not qualify as a Large Corporate under the Securities and Exchange Board of India’s October 2023 circular for the financial year 2026-27. While the company meets the listing requirement with equity share capital of Rs. 29.70 crore and debt securities of Rs. 50 crore on the NSE platform, it does not satisfy the thresholds for outstanding long-term borrowings or the requisite AA or higher credit rating.

As a result, Mangalam Worldwide is exempt from making the initial disclosure mandated for entities classified as Large Corporates at the start of the financial year 2026-27. This clarification limits the company’s immediate compliance and disclosure obligations under the SEBI framework, signaling that its leverage and credit profile remain below the regulatory thresholds set for the largest corporate borrowers.

More about Mangalam Worldwide Ltd.

Mangalam Worldwide Ltd. is a listed Indian company whose equity shares and debt securities trade on the National Stock Exchange of India. The company operates under the corporate identity number L27100GJ1995PLC028381 and has been providing trusted services since 1942, reflecting a long-standing presence in its sector.

See more data about MWL stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: IDFC First Bank Q4 FY26 profit steady as core earnings surge and asset quality improves
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

IDFC First Bank Ltd. ( (IN:IDFCFIRSTB) ) has shared an update.

IDFC First Bank reported audited results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026, showing steady growth in customer business and improving asset quality despite a one-off incident. Loans and advances rose 20% year-on-year, customer deposits increased 17.3%, and the CASA ratio reached 49.8%, while gross and net NPAs declined to 1.61% and 0.48%, supported by lower provision levels.

Quarterly profit after tax for Q4 FY26 inched up 4.9% to Rs. 319 crore, but normalized PAT excluding one-time items surged 145% year-on-year to Rs. 746 crore, highlighting underlying profitability. The bank fully expensed a Chandigarh fraud-related impact of Rs. 483 crore post-tax, maintained a comfortable capital adequacy of 15.6%, and signalled confidence in sustaining healthy deposit growth as microfinance stresses ease and credit quality stabilizes across key retail and wholesale portfolios.

More about IDFC First Bank Ltd.

IDFC First Bank Ltd. is an Indian private-sector bank offering a mix of retail, rural, MSME and wholesale banking services, along with credit cards and wealth management. The bank focuses on building a granular customer deposit base, including strong CASA deposits, and expanding in secured lending segments such as mortgages, vehicle finance and business banking across the country.

Average Trading Volume: 3,338,945

Technical Sentiment Signal: Hold

Current Market Cap: 583.5B INR

data.title: Glarner Kantonalbank Shareholders Back Board, Approve CHF 13.5 Million Dividend
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Glarner Kantonalbank ( (CH:GLKBN) ) has provided an update.

Shareholders of Glarner Kantonalbank approved all proposals from the Board of Directors at the ordinary General Meeting held in Näfels, including the management report, annual financial statements, compensation of board members and the sustainability report. They also endorsed the appropriation of retained earnings and granted discharge to the Board of Directors, Executive Management and statutory auditors for the 2025 financial year.

The meeting approved a dividend of 1.00 Swiss franc per share, resulting in a total payout of 13.5 million francs to shareholders, with about 13 million francs flowing to the public sector via dividends, state guarantee compensation and taxes. Chairman Urs Gnos and the six other board members were re-elected for one year, while PricewaterhouseCoopers AG and the independent proxy were also confirmed, underscoring continuity in governance as the bank moves toward its next General Meeting scheduled for 30 April 2027.

More about Glarner Kantonalbank

Glarner Kantonalbank is a Swiss cantonal bank headquartered in Glarus, serving retail and corporate clients in its home canton and beyond. Its core activities include traditional banking services such as lending, savings and investment products, and it is listed on BX Berne eXchange and SIX Swiss Exchange, giving it access to public capital markets.

Average Trading Volume: 10,939

Current Market Cap: CHF334.8M

The latest update is out from Fujiyama Power Systems Limited ( (IN:UTLSOLAR) ).

Fujiyama Power Systems Limited has granted 400,000 stock options under its Employee Stock Option Plan 2023 to eligible employees, following approval by the board’s Nomination and Remuneration Committee on April 25, 2026. The options, compliant with SEBI’s share-based benefits regulations, are exercisable into an equal number of equity shares with a minimum one-year and maximum four-year vesting period and an exercise price not lower than the face value, signaling a focused effort to align employee incentives with long-term shareholder value and support talent retention as the company expands in the power sector.

More about Fujiyama Power Systems Limited

Fujiyama Power Systems Limited, listed under the symbol UTLSOLAR, operates in the power and solar energy solutions segment, offering products focused on renewable and distributed power systems.
